author: bosulmun
content:
[Current getBlobs CL support]
(Cross-check from CL devs required)
```
| CL Client    | getBlobsV3                             | getBlobsV4         |
|--------------|----------------------------------------|--------------------|
| lighthouse   | unstable (#9930)                       | draft pr (#9438)   |
| prysm        | partial-columns-integration (#16505)   | ❌                 |
| lodestar     | ❌                                     | ❌                 |
| teku         | ❌                                     | ❌                 |
| nimbus       | draft PR (#8066)                       | ❌                 | 
```

author: bosulmun
content: Additional to this, I assume it would be okay to jump to getBlobsV4, but what is the bottleneck in implementing getBlobsV3 ?

author: barnabasbusa
content: bottleneck is probably ppl who can work in this, in combination with work in glamsterdam

author: barnabasbusa
content: we just don’t have enough ppl on many teams working in this as it’s not a fork priority:/

author: tersec
content: https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth2/pull/8066 has `getBlobsV3`. We don't have `getBlobsV4` at all. But is `getBlobsV3` ever going to be the version to use, or yeah, is the idea to jump to V4?

author: tersec
content: if the goal is V4, and both (or only V4?) appear in Glamsterdam, it would make more sense for Nimbus to just pivot to V4 rather than do some dead-on-arrival V3. But I admit I haven't tracked this closely

author: tersec
content: If V3 appears in Glamsterdam and V4 is only guaranteed in Hegotá, fine

author: tersec
content: But then, yes V4 isn't a very high priority for us right now

author: bosulmun
content: Ultimately we want getBlobsV4 (and it is okay to jump if it is possible). getBlobsV4 is for sparse blobpool, which is optional in glam devnet 7.

author: tersec
content: Yeah, I mean, putting devnets aside, the plan is for Glamsterdam to ship with V4?

author: tersec
content: and V4 completely replaces V3, i.e. there's no preferred usecase for V3 left once V4 is available?

author: bosulmun
content: Yes it is the plan, and yes once we have V4 it will replace V3

author: tersec
content: ok, is there a reason to still care about V3 for a CL? If it's sort of optional even now and will become redundant soon... To the extent some devnets might use it, and CL coverage of getBlobsV3 isn't very ubiquitous even now, then my person inclination would be, just drop it completely, today, from Nimbus CL, and switch 8066 to getBlobsV4

author: tersec
content: don't wait for some pointless intermediate period, more immediately obsolete jank

author: bosulmun
content: I understand. I think it makes sense. Maybe <@106441459183423488> has an opinion on this ?

author: tersec
content: The main thing potential contingency would be is if there's still some plan to pump BPOs before Glamsterdam, which would effectively require partial cell dissemination

author: tersec
content: But it seems like that's not likely to happen?

author: bosulmun
content: I don't think we have such plan

author: barnabasbusa
content: Can you do V4 without V3 tho?

author: barnabasbusa
content: Thought we need cells for V3 and thought the whole design of V4 is built on top of this core concept as well for the CL side
